title: Infant-feeding emergency protection plan
summary: Keep the infant with the caregiver, protect breastfeeding support where applicable, secure safe water and clean feeding equipment, and contact health professionals early.
content: Keep the infant with the caregiver, protect breastfeeding support where applicable, secure safe water and clean feeding equipment, and contact health professionals early. Use ready-to-feed products when officially advised and available if safe water or cleaning cannot be assured. Do not dilute formula, make homemade formula, or change feeding without qualified guidance.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Infant-feeding emergency protection plan”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Infant-feeding emergency protection plan»
steps: Keep the infant with the caregiver, protect breastfeeding support where applicable, secure safe water and clean feeding equipment, and contact health professionals early.
Use ready-to-feed products when officially advised and available if safe water or cleaning cannot be assured.
Assign one person to act and another to verify the result for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
Record time, source, action, result, unresolved risk, and next review for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
warnings: Do not dilute formula, make homemade formula, or change feeding without qualified guidance.
Official instructions and trained responders override this offline card for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
common_mistakes: Acting before location, time, hazard, and responsible person are clear for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
Failing to update the plan when conditions change during Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
alternatives: Use a paper note, SMS, radio message, or trusted messenger when the main system is unavailable for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
failure_signs: The decision source, responsible person, or next review cannot be identified for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
The action creates a new hazard or delays qualified help during Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
when_not_to_use: Do not use this card to override an evacuation order, emergency responder, clinician, product label, or local law for Infant-feeding emergency protection plan.
short_term: For Infant-feeding emergency protection plan, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Infant-feeding emergency protection plan, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Infant-feeding emergency protection plan, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Infant-feeding emergency protection plan to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
